{{Quote|Look at me, master! I'm magnificent!|H2|<ref name="ASR2">[[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 2|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 2]]</ref>}}
'''H2''' was a [[Pilot droid/Legends|pilot droid]] for [[Dezono Qua]], an [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] native and sadistic cannibal. After [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Dass Jennir]] killed Qua, he took the droid for himself. Although willing to do Jennir's every bidding in their adventures in the coming months, H2 was outwardly dissatisfied with his new master's behavior, often spouting sarcastic remarks on Jennir's altruistic decisions and referring to him as "Man-who-killed-my-master." During this time, H2 covertly assisted [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Falco Sang]] — hired by Qua's family — with tracking Jennir down, using his security channel to communicate with him. This secret exchange came to an end at [[Telerath/Legends|Telerath]] when H2 was critically damaged while delivering news from the mob controlled [[Noua|town]] to [[Fish (Human)|Fish's]] hut.
After Jennir's victory over the [[Slaver/Legends|Slavers]], Jennir sought to repair the droid. Possibly due to the usage of number five memory cable splicer instead of the required number six<ref name="OotW1">[[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 1|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 1]]</ref> affecting his personality modulators<ref name="ASR2" />, the droid's acidic sarcasm was replaced by a cheerful personality. Furthermore, it fully accepted Jennir as his Master, something possibly aided by the amnesia it also suffered in its new state.
[[File:H2TakesaBlasterBoltforEmber.jpg|thumb|left|H2 saves [[Ember Chankeli]] on [[Prine]].]]
Four months after the institution of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Sang caught up with Jennir on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Prine]], but was disarmed and defeated. When the bounty hunter revealed the truth to Jennir, H2 claimed ignorance. Soon afterwards, H2 took a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt fired by Sang's droid [[Izee|I-Z]] to save Jennir's protégé [[Ember Chankeli]], and shut down, using his last words to apologize to his new master. Jennir was too preoccupied with Chankeli, whom he believed dead from the blast, to register the fact that H2 had been deactivated.<ref name="OotW5" />
When the ''[[Uhumele]]'' arrived on Prine, they rescued Jennir and Ember, as well as salvage H2.<ref name="ASR1">[[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 1|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 1]]</ref> With [[Meekerdin-maa|Ratty's]] help, H2 was fully restored, albeit without the repair to the personality modulators on Jennir's request, and the new droid chose a pink color scheme for himself.<ref name="ASR2" />

{{Droid-stub}}
